app.name: Ray Finance
app.one_liner: An open-source AI financial advisor that learns your situation and gets smarter every conversation.

screens.name: Chat Interface
screens.purpose: Primary interaction surface where users converse with Ray, receive financial briefings, and issue commands.

rust_commands.name: ray_add
rust_commands.purpose: Add manual assets like homes, cars, or crypto holdings to the user's financial profile.

rust_commands.name: ray_demo
rust_commands.purpose: Launch Ray in demo mode with realistic fake financial data for testing without bank connections.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build CLI chat interface with line editing support
week 1: Enable PII masking before AI processing
week 1: Implement encrypted SQLite storage with AES-256
week 1: Integrate Plaid for bank account linking
acceptance_tests: Behavior score updates correctly after zero-spend days or budget adherence.
PII such as account numbers is scrubbed before any data is sent to the AI model.
User can run `ray demo` and interact with realistic fake financial data without connecting real accounts.
User receives a personalized financial briefing on startup that includes family, goals, and recent spending.
